comparison.note: Real LQ targets: 106 ISIC-matched (all target=0, benign) + 68 Fitzpatrick (target=0). ECE measures how well the model's low prob_pos aligns with the all-benign ground truth. Low ECE here means the model correctly predicts low malignancy on challenging-quality benign images. Mean entropy and rho(H,quality) are directly comparable with ITB-LQ values.
